quote_en: 爱情让人感到幸福。 Àiqíng ràng rén gǎndào xìngfú.
quote_zh: Romantic love makes people feel happy.
ex_en: 我姐姐和她的男朋友感情很好，他们互相帮助，一起学习，我觉得这就是爱情最好的样子。 Wǒ jiějie hé tā de nánpéngyou gǎnqíng hěn hǎo, tāmen hùxiāng bāngzhù, yīqǐ xuéxí, wǒ juéde zhè jiùshì àiqíng zuì hǎo de yàngzi.
ex_zh: My older sister and her boyfriend have a very good relationship; they help each other and study together. I think this is what romantic love looks like at its best.

quote_en: 明天我们要向老师报告。 Míngtiān wǒmen yào xiàng lǎoshī bàogào.
quote_zh: Tomorrow we will report to the teacher.
ex_en: 上星期我在中文课上作了一个报告，说了我喜欢的电影和音乐，同学们都很喜欢听。 Shàng xīngqī wǒ zài Zhōngwén kè shàng zuò le yī gè bàogào, shuō le wǒ xǐhuān de diànyǐng hé yīnyuè, tóngxuémen dōu hěn xǐhuān tīng.
ex_zh: Last week I gave a report in Chinese class about the movies and music I like; my classmates all enjoyed listening.

quote_en: 我们要保护小动物。 Wǒmen yào bǎohù xiǎo dòngwù.
quote_zh: We need to protect small animals.
ex_en: 在学校里，老师和同学都会保护我们，但是长大后我们也要学会保护自己和家人。 Zài xuéxiào lǐ, lǎoshī hé tóngxué dōu huì bǎohù wǒmen, dànshì zhǎng dà hòu wǒmen yě yào xuéhuì bǎohù zìjǐ hé jiārén.
ex_zh: At school, teachers and classmates will protect us, but when we grow up we also need to learn to protect ourselves and our families.

quote_en: 我想报名中文班。 Wǒ xiǎng bàomíng Zhōngwén bān.
quote_zh: I want to sign up for Chinese class.
ex_en: 我的好朋友昨天报名了学校的跑步比赛，他每天放学后都去操场练习，我也想去给他加油。 Wǒ de hǎo péngyou zuótiān bàomíng le xuéxiào de pǎobù bǐsài, tā měitiān fàngxué hòu dōu qù cāochǎng liànxí, wǒ yě xiǎng qù gěi tā jiāyóu.
ex_zh: My good friend signed up for the school’s running race yesterday; he goes to the playground to practice every day after school, and I also want to go cheer him on.

quote_en: 你每天必须早睡早起。 Nǐ měitiān bìxū zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ.
quote_zh: You must go to bed early and wake up early every day.
ex_en: 坐公共汽车的时候，我们必须排队上车，不能推别人，这是对大家的尊重。 Zuò gōnggòng qìchē de shíhou, wǒmen bìxū páiduì shàng chē, bùnéng tuī biérén, zhè shì duì dàjiā de zūnzhòng.
ex_zh: When taking the bus, we must line up to get on and not push others; this is respect for everyone.

def_zh: 气候变化；发生很大变化
quote_en: 最近天气变化很大。 Zuìjìn tiānqì biànhuà hěn dà.
quote_zh: The weather has changed a lot recently.
ex_en: 我的家乡以前很小，没有什么商店，这几年变化很大，现在有了大超市和图书馆，生活方便多了。 Wǒ de jiāxiāng yǐqián hěn xiǎo, méiyǒu shénme shāngdiàn, zhè jǐ nián biànhuà hěn dà, xiànzài yǒu le dà chāoshì hé túshūguǎn, shēnghuó fāngbiàn duō le.
ex_zh: My hometown used to be very small with few shops; in recent years it has changed a lot, and now there are big supermarkets and a library, making life much more convenient.

quote_en: 走路不如坐车快。 Zǒulù bùrú zuò chē kuài.
quote_zh: Walking is not as fast as taking a car.
ex_en: 很多人觉得在家看电视不如去电影院看电影好，但是我觉得在家里看更方便，还可以一边吃零食。 Hěnduō rén juéde zài jiā kàn diànshì bùrú qù diànyǐngyuàn kàn diànyǐng hǎo, dànshì wǒ juéde zài jiā lǐ kàn gèng fāngbiàn, hái kěyǐ yībiān chī língshí.
ex_zh: Many people think watching TV at home is not as good as going to the cinema to watch a movie, but I think watching at home is more convenient, and you can also snack while watching.

quote_en: 我不太明白这个问题。 Wǒ bù tài míngbái zhège wèntí.
quote_zh: I don’t quite understand this question.
ex_en: 爸爸的手机太旧了，他不太会用新的软件，但是他很努力地学习，现在已经会发照片了。 Bàba de shǒujī tài jiù le, tā bù tài huì yòng xīn de ruǎnjiàn, dànshì tā hěn nǔlì de xuéxí, xiànzài yǐjīng huì fā zhàopiàn le.
ex_zh: Dad’s phone is too old; he doesn’t quite know how to use new apps, but he studies very hard, and now he already knows how to send photos.

quote_en: 写作业时可以查课本。 Xiě zuòyè shí kěyǐ chá kèběn.
quote_zh: When doing homework, you can check the textbook.
ex_en: 去外国旅行之前，我习惯先上网查一下当地的天气和好吃的餐厅，这样就不会浪费时间和钱了。 Qù wàiguó lǚxíng zhīqián, wǒ xíguàn xiān shàngwǎng chá yīxià dāngdì de tiānqì hé hǎochī de cāntīng, zhèyàng jiù bù huì làngfèi shíjiān hé qián le.
ex_zh: Before traveling abroad, I usually go online first to check the local weather and good restaurants, so that I won’t waste time and money.

quote_en: 我的身高超过了一米七。 Wǒ de shēngāo chāoguò le yī mǐ qī.
quote_zh: My height exceeds 1.7 meters.
ex_en: 在这次考试中，小明的成绩超过了班上的很多同学，但是他还是很认真地在学习，从来不觉得自己已经很好了。 Zài zhè cì kǎoshì zhōng, Xiǎo Míng de chéngjì chāoguò le bān shàng de hěnduō tóngxué, dànshì tā háishì hěn rènzhēn de zài xuéxí, cónglái bù juéde zìjǐ yǐjīng hěn hǎo le.
ex_zh: In this exam, Xiao Ming’s score surpassed many classmates in the class, but he still studies very seriously and never thinks he is already good enough.

quote_en: 除了中文，我还喜欢英文。 Chúle Zhōngwén, wǒ hái xǐhuān Yīngwén.
quote_zh: Besides Chinese, I also like English.
ex_en: 除了周末去公园散步，我爸爸每天早上也会去运动，他觉得锻炼身体对健康很重要。 Chúle zhōumò qù gōngyuán sànbù, wǒ bàba měitiān zǎoshang yě huì qù yùndòng, tā juéde duànliàn shēntǐ duì jiànkāng hěn zhòngyào.
ex_zh: Besides going to the park for walks on weekends, my dad also goes to exercise every morning; he thinks exercising is very important for health.

quote_en: 他代表班级去开会。 Tā dàibiǎo bānjí qù kāihuì.
quote_zh: He represents the class to attend the meeting.
ex_en: 上个月我妹妹代表学校参加了唱歌比赛，她穿了一条漂亮的裙子，唱了一首中文歌，大家都为她鼓掌。 Shàng gè yuè wǒ mèimei dàibiǎo xuéxiào cānjiā le chànggē bǐsài, tā chuān le yī tiáo piàoliang de qúnzi, chàng le yī shǒu Zhōngwén gē, dàjiā dōu wèi tā gǔzhǎng.
ex_zh: Last month my younger sister represented the school in a singing competition; she wore a beautiful dress and sang a Chinese song, and everyone applauded for her.

quote_en: 旅行时我喜欢看地图。 Lǚxíng shí wǒ xǐhuān kàn dìtú.
quote_zh: When traveling, I like to look at a map.
ex_en: 第一次去北京的时候，我不会用手机地图，所以迷路了，后来一个好心的大叔帮我找到了酒店。 Dì yī cì qù Běijīng de shíhou, wǒ bù huì yòng shǒujī dìtú, suǒyǐ mílù le, hòulái yī gè hǎoxīn de dàshū bāng wǒ zhǎodào le jiǔdiàn.
ex_zh: The first time I went to Beijing, I didn’t know how to use the map on my phone, so I got lost; later a kind uncle helped me find the hotel.

quote_en: 今天的天气多么好！ Jīntiān de tiānqì duōme hǎo!
quote_zh: How nice the weather is today!
ex_en: 无论学习多么辛苦，只要想到周末可以和家人一起吃饭、看电影，我就觉得很有动力。 Wúlùn xuéxí duōme xīnkǔ, zhǐyào xiǎngdào zhōumò kěyǐ hé jiārén yīqǐ chīfàn, kàn diànyǐng, wǒ jiù juéde hěn yǒu dònglì.
ex_zh: No matter how hard studying is, as long as I think about eating and watching movies with my family on the weekend, I feel very motivated.

quote_en: 我反对这个想法。 Wǒ fǎnduì zhège xiǎngfǎ.
quote_zh: I oppose this idea.
ex_en: 很多家长反对孩子花太多时间玩电脑游戏，他们认为孩子应该多读书、多运动，我也同意他们的看法。 Hěnduō jiāzhǎng fǎnduì háizi huā tài duō shíjiān wán diànnǎo yóuxì, tāmen rènwéi háizi yīnggāi duō dúshū, duō yùndòng, wǒ yě tóngyì tāmen de kànfǎ.
ex_zh: Many parents oppose children spending too much time playing computer games; they think children should read more and exercise more, and I also agree with their view.

def_zh: 学习方法；解决问题的方法
quote_en: 这个学习方法很有效。 Zhège xuéxí fāngfǎ hěn yǒuxiào.
quote_zh: This learning method is very effective.
ex_en: 学中文的时候，我发现一个好方法：每天看十分钟中文电视，然后写下三个新词，这样记得特别快。 Xué Zhōngwén de shíhou, wǒ fāxiàn yī gè hǎo fāngfǎ: měitiān kàn shí fēnzhōng Zhōngwén diànshì, ránhòu xiě xià sān gè xīn cí, zhèyàng jì de tèbié kuài.
ex_zh: When learning Chinese, I found a good method: watch Chinese TV for ten minutes every day, then write down three new words; this way you remember them very quickly.

quote_en: 妈妈，请放心，我会早回家。 Māma, qǐng fàngxīn, wǒ huì zǎo huí jiā.
quote_zh: Mom, please don’t worry, I will come home early.
ex_en: 父母总是对孩子不放心，但是当我们学会自己做饭、自己安排时间，他们就会慢慢放心了。 Fùmǔ zǒngshì duì háizi bù fàngxīn, dànshì dāng wǒmen xuéhuì zìjǐ zuòfàn, zìjǐ ānpái shíjiān, tāmen jiù huì mànmàn fàngxīn le.
ex_zh: Parents are always worried about their children, but when we learn to cook by ourselves and manage our own time, they will slowly feel relieved.

quote_en: 我的父亲是医生。 Wǒ de fùqīn shì yīshēng.
quote_zh: My father is a doctor.
ex_en: 小时候我不太理解父亲为什么总是很忙，长大后我才明白，他努力工作是为了让家人过得更好。 Xiǎoshíhou wǒ bù tài lǐjiě fùqīn wèishénme zǒngshì hěn máng, zhǎng dà hòu wǒ cái míngbái, tā nǔlì gōngzuò shì wèile ràng jiārén guò de gèng hǎo.
ex_zh: When I was young I didn’t quite understand why my father was always so busy; after growing up I realized that he works hard so that our family can live better.

quote_en: 我家附近有一个公园。 Wǒ jiā fùjìn yǒu yī gè gōngyuán.
quote_zh: There is a park near my home.
ex_en: 学校附近开了一家新书店，我每天放学后都会去那里看一会儿书，有时候还会买一本带回家。 Xuéxiào fùjìn kāi le yī jiā xīn shūdiàn, wǒ měitiān fàngxué hòu dōu huì qù nàlǐ kàn yīhuìr shū, yǒu shíhou hái huì mǎi yī běn dài huí jiā.
ex_zh: A new bookstore opened near the school; every day after school I go there to read for a while, and sometimes I buy a book to take home.

quote_en: 我感觉今天很开心。 Wǒ gǎnjué jīntiān hěn kāixīn.
quote_zh: I feel very happy today.
ex_en: 第一次上台演讲的时候，我感觉非常紧张，但是讲完以后同学们都给我鼓掌，那种感觉真好。 Dì yī cì shàng tái yǎnjiǎng de shíhou, wǒ gǎnjué fēicháng jǐnzhāng, dànshì jiǎng wán yǐhòu tóngxuémen dōu gěi wǒ gǔzhǎng, nà zhǒng gǎnjué zhēn hǎo.
ex_zh: The first time I gave a speech on stage, I felt very nervous, but after I finished, all my classmates applauded for me; that feeling was really good.

quote_en: 我要感谢老师的帮助。 Wǒ yào gǎnxiè lǎoshī de bāngzhù.
quote_zh: I want to thank the teacher for her help.
ex_en: 过生日的时候，我收到了很多礼物，我写了一封信感谢大家，还画了一幅画送给妈妈。 Guò shēngrì de shíhou, wǒ shōudào le hěnduō lǐwù, wǒ xiě le yī fēng xìn gǎnxiè dàjiā, hái huà le yī fú huà sòng gěi māma.
ex_zh: On my birthday, I received many gifts; I wrote a letter to thank everyone, and also drew a picture for my mom.

quote_en: 这不是根本问题。 Zhè bùshì gēnběn wèntí.
quote_zh: This is not the fundamental problem.
ex_en: 我根本不想去那家餐厅吃饭，因为那里的菜又贵又不好吃，而且服务员态度很差。 Wǒ gēnběn bù xiǎng qù nà jiā cāntīng chīfàn, yīnwèi nàlǐ de cài yòu guì yòu bù hǎochī, érqiě fúwùyuán tàidù hěn chà.
ex_zh: I absolutely don’t want to eat at that restaurant, because the food there is expensive and not tasty, and the waiters have a very bad attitude.

quote_en: 每个公民都要守法。 Měi gè gōngmín dōu yào shǒu fǎ.
quote_zh: Every citizen must obey the law.
ex_en: 作为一个好公民，我们不仅要爱护公共环境，还要帮助有需要的人，比如给老人让座。 Zuòwéi yī gè hǎo gōngmín, wǒmen bùjǐn yào àihù gōnggòng huánjìng, hái yào bāngzhù yǒu xūyào de rén, bǐrú gěi lǎorén ràngzuò.
ex_zh: As a good citizen, we must not only take care of the public environment, but also help people in need, such as giving up our seat to the elderly.

quote_en: 我经常关注天气预报。 Wǒ jīngcháng guānzhù tiānqì yùbào.
quote_zh: I often follow the weather forecast.
ex_en: 很多年轻人喜欢关注明星的新闻，但是我觉得也应该多关注身边的朋友和家人，因为他们才是最重要的人。 Hěnduō niánqīng rén xǐhuān guānzhù míngxīng de xīnwén, dànshì wǒ juéde yě yīnggāi duō guānzhù shēnbiān de péngyou hé jiārén, yīnwèi tāmen cái shì zuì zhòngyào de rén.
ex_zh: Many young people like to follow celebrity news, but I think they should also pay more attention to friends and family around them, because they are the most important people.

quote_en: 小狗害怕打雷。 Xiǎo gǒu hàipà dǎléi.
quote_zh: The little dog is afraid of thunder.
ex_en: 小时候我害怕一个人睡觉，后来妈妈每天晚上给我讲故事，慢慢地我就不害怕了。 Xiǎoshíhou wǒ hàipà yī gè rén shuìjiào, hòulái māma měitiān wǎnshàng gěi wǒ jiǎng gùshi, mànmàn de wǒ jiù bù hàipà le.
ex_zh: When I was little I was afraid to sleep alone; later Mom told me stories every night, and slowly I was no longer afraid.

quote_en: 我们都想要和平。 Wǒmen dōu xiǎng yào hépíng.
quote_zh: We all want peace.
ex_en: 世界上还有一些地方不太和平，但是我相信只要人们愿意坐下来好好谈，就能找到解决问题的办法。 Shìjiè shàng hái yǒu yīxiē dìfāng bù tài hépíng, dànshì wǒ xiāngxìn zhǐyào rénmen yuànyì zuò xiàlái hǎohǎo tán, jiù néng zhǎodào jiějué wèntí de bànfǎ.
ex_zh: There are still some places in the world that are not very peaceful, but I believe that as long as people are willing to sit down and talk properly, they can find a way to solve problems.

def_zh: 合适的时间；合适的人选
quote_en: 这个颜色很合适。 Zhège yánsè hěn héshì.
quote_zh: This color is very appropriate.
ex_en: 找工作的时候，很多人只看工资高不高，但是我觉得找到一份适合自己兴趣的工作更加重要。 Zhǎo gōngzuò de shíhou, hěnduō rén zhǐ kàn gōngzī gāo bù gāo, dànshì wǒ juéde zhǎodào yī fèn shìhé zìjǐ xìngqù de gōngzuò gèngjiā zhòngyào.
ex_zh: When looking for a job, many people only care about whether the salary is high, but I think finding a job that suits your interests is even more important.

def_zh: 后来才知道；后来怎么样了
quote_en: 开始下雨了，后来停了。 Kāishǐ xià yǔ le, hòulái tíng le.
quote_zh: It started raining, and later it stopped.
ex_en: 小时候我不喜欢学中文，后来妈妈每天陪我读故事，慢慢我就爱上了中文，现在能看懂简单的新闻了。 Xiǎoshíhou wǒ bù xǐhuān xué Zhōngwén, hòulái māma měitiān péi wǒ dú gùshi, mànmàn wǒ jiù ài shàng le Zhōngwén, xiànzài néng kàndǒng jiǎndān de xīnwén le.
ex_zh: When I was young I didn’t like learning Chinese; later Mom read stories with me every day, and slowly I fell in love with Chinese; now I can understand simple news.

quote_en: 新西兰有很多华人。 Xīnxīlán yǒu hěnduō huárén.
quote_zh: There are many overseas Chinese in New Zealand.
ex_en: 我邻居是一位华人阿姨，她教我包饺子，还告诉我很多中国的节日，我觉得她的故事很有意思。 Wǒ línjū shì yī wèi huárén āyí, tā jiāo wǒ bāo jiǎozi, hái gàosu wǒ hěnduō Zhōngguó de jiérì, wǒ juéde tā de gùshi hěn yǒuyìsi.
ex_zh: My neighbor is a Chinese aunt; she taught me how to make dumplings and told me about many Chinese festivals; I find her stories very interesting.

quote_en: 学校环境很干净。 Xuéxiào huánjìng hěn gānjìng.
quote_zh: The school environment is very clean.
ex_en: 我们应该保护环境，比如不乱扔垃圾、少用塑料袋，这些小事做起来不难，但是对地球很有好处。 Wǒmen yīnggāi bǎohù huánjìng, bǐrú bù luàn rēng lājī, shǎo yòng sùliàodài, zhèxiē xiǎoshì zuò qǐlái bù nán, dànshì duì dìqiú hěn yǒu hǎochù.
ex_zh: We should protect the environment, such as not littering and using fewer plastic bags; these small things are not hard to do, but they are very good for the Earth.

def_zh: 回收利用；垃圾分类回收
quote_en: 我们要回收废纸。 Wǒmen yào huíshōu fèizhǐ.
quote_zh: We need to recycle waste paper.
ex_en: 学校最近开展了垃圾分类的活动，同学们把塑料瓶和报纸分开扔，这样可以回收利用，保护环境。 Xuéxiào zuìjìn kāizhǎn le lājī fēnlèi de huódòng, tóngxuémen bǎ sùliàopíng hé bàozhǐ fēnkāi rēng, zhèyàng kěyǐ huíshōu lìyòng, bǎohù huánjìng.
ex_zh: The school recently carried out a waste sorting activity; students separate plastic bottles and newspapers, so they can be recycled and protect the environment.

quote_en: 我有一个学习计划。 Wǒ yǒu yī gè xuéxí jìhuà.
quote_zh: I have a study plan.
ex_en: 暑假的时候，我和家人计划去海边玩，我们先订了酒店，然后查了当地的天气，最后玩得很开心。 Shǔjià de shíhou, wǒ hé jiārén jìhuà qù hǎibiān wán, wǒmen xiān dìng le jiǔdiàn, ránhòu chá le dāngdì de tiānqì, zuìhòu wán de hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: During summer vacation, my family and I planned to go to the beach; we first booked a hotel, then checked the local weather, and in the end we had a great time.

quote_en: 这是一个好机会。 Zhè shì yī gè hǎo jīhuì.
quote_zh: This is a good opportunity.
ex_en: 学习中文给了我很多机会，比如认识新朋友、了解不同的文化，还让我能去中国留学。 Xuéxí Zhōngwén gěi le wǒ hěnduō jīhuì, bǐrú rènshi xīn péngyou, liǎojiě bùtóng de wénhuà, hái ràng wǒ néng qù Zhōngguó liúxué.
ex_zh: Learning Chinese has given me many opportunities, such as making new friends, understanding different cultures, and even allowing me to study in China.

quote_en: 这个问题很简单。 Zhège wèntí hěn jiǎndān.
quote_zh: This question is very simple.
ex_en: 很多人把幸福想得很复杂，但其实幸福很简单：有家人陪在身边，有朋友一起聊天，做自己喜欢的事。 Hěnduō rén bǎ xìngfú xiǎng dé hěn fùzá, dàn qíshí xìngfú hěn jiǎndān: yǒu jiārén péi zài shēnbiān, yǒu péngyou yīqǐ liáotiān, zuò zìjǐ xǐhuān de shì.
ex_zh: Many people think happiness is very complicated, but actually happiness is simple: having family by your side, having friends to chat with, and doing what you love.

quote_en: 我将来想当老师。 Wǒ jiānglái xiǎng dāng lǎoshī.
quote_zh: In the future I want to be a teacher.
ex_en: 现在努力学习是为了将来有更多选择，不用让别人替你做决定，也不会后悔。 Xiànzài nǔlì xuéxí shì wèile jiānglái yǒu gèng duō xuǎnzé, bùyòng ràng biérén tì nǐ zuò juédìng, yě bù huì hòuhuǐ.
ex_zh: Studying hard now is to have more choices in the future, so you don’t have to let others make decisions for you, and you won’t regret it.

quote_en: 多和朋友交流很好。 Duō hé péngyou jiāoliú hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: Communicating more with friends is good.
ex_en: 我参加了一个中文角，每周和中国的留学生一起聊天，通过交流，我的口语进步很快。 Wǒ cānjiā le yī gè Zhōngwén jiǎo, měi zhōu hé Zhōngguó de liúxuéshēng yīqǐ liáotiān, tōngguò jiāoliú, wǒ de kǒuyǔ jìnbù hěn kuài.
ex_zh: I joined a Chinese corner and chat every week with Chinese exchange students; through communication, my spoken Chinese improves quickly.

quote_en: 考试结果很好。 Kǎoshì jiéguǒ hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: The exam results are very good.
ex_en: 他每天玩游戏到很晚，结果第二天上课睡觉，被老师批评了，他后悔没有早点睡觉。 Tā měitiān wán yóuxì dào hěn wǎn, jiéguǒ dì èr tiān shàngkè shuìjiào, bèi lǎoshī pīpíng le, tā hòuhuǐ méiyǒu zǎodiǎn shuìjiào.
ex_zh: He played games very late every day; as a result, he slept in class the next day and was criticized by the teacher; he regretted not going to bed earlier.

quote_en: 电影结束了。 Diànyǐng jiéshù le.
quote_zh: The movie has ended.
ex_en: 暑假结束后，我们回到了学校，同学们分享了各自的旅行故事，虽然假期结束了，但是友谊还在继续。 Shǔjià jiéshù hòu, wǒmen huí dào le xuéxiào, tóngxuémen fēnxiǎng le gèzì de lǚxíng gùshi, suīrán jiàqī jiéshù le, dànshì yǒuyì hái zài jìxù.
ex_zh: After summer vacation ended, we returned to school; classmates shared their travel stories. Although the holiday ended, the friendship continues.

quote_en: 我们一起解决问题。 Wǒmen yīqǐ jiějué wèntí.
quote_zh: Let’s solve the problem together.
ex_en: 弟弟和同学吵架了，我教他好好说话，互相道歉，最后他们解决了矛盾，又一起玩了。 Dìdi hé tóngxué chǎojià le, wǒ jiāo tā hǎohǎo shuōhuà, hùxiāng dàoqiàn, zuìhòu tāmen jiějué le máodùn, yòu yīqǐ wán le.
ex_zh: My younger brother quarreled with his classmate; I taught him to speak nicely and apologize to each other; in the end they solved the conflict and played together again.

quote_en: 我经过公园去学校。 Wǒ jīngguò gōngyuán qù xuéxiào.
quote_zh: I pass by the park on my way to school.
ex_en: 经过三年的努力学习，我的中文水平提高了很多，现在可以和中国人流利地聊天了。 Jīngguò sān nián de nǔlì xuéxí, wǒ de Zhōngwén shuǐpíng tígāo le hěnduō, xiànzài kěyǐ hé Zhōngguó rén liúlì de liáotiān le.
ex_zh: After three years of hard study, my Chinese level has improved a lot, and now I can chat fluently with Chinese people.

quote_en: 他有很多教学经验。 Tā yǒu hěnduō jiàoxué jīngyàn.
quote_zh: He has a lot of teaching experience.
ex_en: 第一次做饭的时候我失败了，但是有了这次经验，第二次我就知道盐不能放太多，结果做得很好吃。 Dì yī cì zuòfàn de shíhou wǒ shībài le, dànshì yǒu le zhè cì jīngyàn, dì èr cì wǒ jiù zhīdào yán bùnéng fàng tài duō, jiéguǒ zuò de hěn hǎochī.
ex_zh: The first time I cooked I failed, but with this experience, the second time I knew not to put too much salt, and as a result it tasted very good.

quote_en: 这件衣服很旧了。 Zhè jiàn yīfu hěn jiù le.
quote_zh: This piece of clothing is very old.
ex_en: 很多年轻人喜欢买新手机，但是我觉得旧手机只要还能用，就不应该随便扔掉，这样对环境也好。 Hěnduō niánqīng rén xǐhuān mǎi xīn shǒujī, dànshì wǒ juéde jiù shǒujī zhǐyào hái néng yòng, jiù bù yīnggāi suíbiàn rēngdiào, zhèyàng duì huánjìng yě hǎo.
ex_zh: Many young people like to buy new phones, but I think as long as an old phone still works, it shouldn’t be thrown away casually; that is also good for the environment.

quote_en: 据说今晚要下雨。 Jùshuō jīn wǎn yào xià yǔ.
quote_zh: It is said that it will rain tonight.
ex_en: 据说中国人过年的时候要吃饺子、发红包，我觉得这些传统很有意思，也能让家人更亲近。 Jùshuō Zhōngguó rén guònián de shíhou yào chī jiǎozi, fā hóngbāo, wǒ juéde zhèxiē chuántǒng hěn yǒuyìsi, yě néng ràng jiārén gèng qīnjìn.
ex_zh: It is said that during the Chinese New Year, people eat dumplings and give red envelopes; I think these traditions are very interesting and also bring family closer.

quote_en: 我想听听你的看法。 Wǒ xiǎng tīngting nǐ de kànfǎ.
quote_zh: I want to hear your view.
ex_en: 对于同一个问题，每个人的看法可能不同，我觉得我们应该尊重别人，耐心听他们说完。 Duìyú tóng yī gè wèntí, měi gè rén de kànfǎ kěnéng bùtóng, wǒ juéde wǒmen yīnggāi zūnzhòng biérén, nàixīn tīng tāmen shuō wán.
ex_zh: Regarding the same issue, everyone may have different views; I think we should respect others and listen patiently until they finish.

quote_en: 那个声音很可怕。 Nà gè shēngyīn hěn kěpà.
quote_zh: That sound is very scary.
ex_en: 很多人害怕考试，觉得考试很可怕，但是我觉得只要平时认真复习，考试就没那么可怕了。 Hěnduō rén hàipà kǎoshì, juéde kǎoshì hěn kěpà, dànshì wǒ juéde zhǐyào píngshí rènzhēn fùxí, kǎoshì jiù méi nàme kěpà le.
ex_zh: Many people are afraid of exams and think exams are terrible, but I think as long as you review seriously in normal times, exams are not so terrible.

quote_en: 这个房间空间很大。 Zhège fángjiān kōngjiān hěn dà.
quote_zh: This room has a lot of space.
ex_en: 每个人都需要自己的空间，父母应该给孩子一些自由，让他们自己安排时间，学会独立。 Měi gè rén dōu xūyào zìjǐ de kōngjiān, fùmǔ yīnggāi gěi háizi yīxiē zìyóu, ràng tāmen zìjǐ ānpái shíjiān, xuéhuì dúlì.
ex_zh: Everyone needs their own space; parents should give children some freedom, let them arrange their own time, and learn to be independent.

quote_en: 请不要乱扔垃圾。 Qǐng bùyào luàn rēng lājī.
quote_zh: Please don’t litter.
ex_en: 我们家每天都把垃圾分类，厨余垃圾放一个袋子，塑料瓶和报纸放另一个袋子，这样环卫工人回收起来更方便。 Wǒmen jiā měitiān dōu bǎ lājī fēnlèi, chúyú lājī fàng yī gè dàizi, sùliàopíng hé bàozhǐ fàng lìng yī gè dàizi, zhèyàng huánwèi gōngrén huíshōu qǐlái gèng fāngbiàn.
ex_zh: Our family sorts rubbish every day; food waste goes in one bag, plastic bottles and newspapers in another; this makes it easier for sanitation workers to recycle.

quote_en: 他是一个乐观的人。 Tā shì yī gè lèguān de rén.
quote_zh: He is an optimistic person.
ex_en: 生活中总会遇到困难，但是乐观的人会看到希望，想办法解决，而悲观的人只会抱怨。 Shēnghuó zhōng zǒng huì yùdào kùnnán, dànshì lèguān de rén huì kàndào xīwàng, xiǎng bànfǎ jiějué, ér bēiguān de rén zhǐ huì bàoyuàn.
ex_zh: In life we always encounter difficulties, but optimistic people see hope and find ways to solve them, while pessimistic people only complain.

quote_en: 这两个词意思类似。 Zhè liǎng gè cí yìsi lèisì.
quote_zh: These two words have similar meanings.
ex_en: 很多年轻人有类似的梦想，比如去外国旅行、学好一门外语，但是真正能实现的往往是那些坚持努力的人。 Hěnduō niánqīng rén yǒu lèisì de mèngxiǎng, bǐrú qù wàiguó lǚxíng, xué hǎo yī mén wàiyǔ, dànshì zhēnzhèng néng shíxiàn de wǎngwǎng shì nàxiē jiānchí nǔlì de rén.
ex_zh: Many young people have similar dreams, such as traveling abroad or learning a foreign language well, but those who can truly achieve them are often the ones who persist and work hard.

quote_en: 我们要利用好时间。 Wǒmen yào lìyòng hǎo shíjiān.
quote_zh: We need to make good use of time.
ex_en: 在图书馆里，我们可以充分利用各种书和资料，不用花钱就能学到很多知识。 Zài túshūguǎn lǐ, wǒmen kěyǐ chōngfèn lìyòng gèzhǒng shū hé zīliào, bùyòng huā qián jiù néng xué dào hěnduō zhīshi.
ex_zh: In the library, we can make full use of various books and materials, learning a lot of knowledge without spending money.

quote_en: 你没有理由迟到。 Nǐ méiyǒu lǐyóu chídào.
quote_zh: You have no reason to be late.
ex_en: 很多人放弃学中文的理由是觉得太难了，但是我觉得只要每天学十分钟，慢慢就能进步。 Hěnduō rén fàngqì xué Zhōngwén de lǐyóu shì juéde tài nán le, dànshì wǒ juéde zhǐyào měitiān xué shí fēnzhōng, mànmàn jiù néng jìnbù.
ex_zh: Many people give up learning Chinese because they think it’s too hard, but I think as long as you study ten minutes every day, you can gradually improve.

quote_en: 我喜欢和朋友聊天。 Wǒ xǐhuān hé péngyou liáotiān.
quote_zh: I like to chat with friends.
ex_en: 周末的时候，我常常和家人坐在一起喝茶、聊天，说说学校发生的有趣的事，感觉特别放松。 Zhōumò de shíhou, wǒ chángcháng hé jiārén zuò zài yīqǐ hē chá, liáotiān, shuō shuō xuéxiào fāshēng de yǒuqù de shì, gǎnjué tèbié fàngsōng.
ex_zh: On weekends, I often sit with my family drinking tea and chatting, talking about interesting things that happened at school; it feels very relaxing.

def_zh: 流利地说话；流利的中文
quote_en: 他说中文很流利。 Tā shuō Zhōngwén hěn liúlì.
quote_zh: He speaks Chinese very fluently.
ex_en: 想要说一口流利的外语，最好的办法是多听多说，不用怕犯错，慢慢就会越来越好。 Xiǎng yào shuō yī kǒu liúlì de wàiyǔ, zuì hǎo de bànfǎ shì duō tīng duō shuō, bùyòng pà fàncuò, mànmàn jiù huì yuè lái yuè hǎo.
ex_zh: If you want to speak a foreign language fluently, the best way is to listen and speak a lot, don’t be afraid of making mistakes, and gradually you will get better and better.

quote_en: 老师对我的作业很满意。 Lǎoshī duì wǒ de zuòyè hěn mǎnyì.
quote_zh: The teacher is very satisfied with my homework.
ex_en: 很多父母总是对孩子的成绩不满意，但是我觉得只要孩子努力了，就应该多鼓励，而不是批评。 Hěnduō fùmǔ zǒngshì duì háizi de chéngjì bù mǎnyì, dànshì wǒ juéde zhǐyào háizi nǔlì le, jiù yīnggāi duō gǔlì, ér bùshì pīpíng.
ex_zh: Many parents are always dissatisfied with their children’s grades, but I think as long as the child worked hard, we should encourage them more rather than criticize.

quote_en: 媒体传播信息很快。 Méitǐ chuánbō xìnxī hěn kuài.
quote_zh: The media spreads information very quickly.
ex_en: 现在的年轻人花很多时间看社交媒体，但是我觉得也应该多看看书，因为书里的知识更可靠。 Xiànzài de niánqīng rén huā hěnduō shíjiān kàn shèjiāo méitǐ, dànshì wǒ juéde yě yīnggāi duō kànkan shū, yīnwèi shū lǐ de zhīshi gèng kěkào.
ex_zh: Nowadays young people spend a lot of time on social media, but I think they should also read more books, because the knowledge in books is more reliable.

quote_en: 我有一个梦想。 Wǒ yǒu yī gè mèngxiǎng.
quote_zh: I have a dream.
ex_en: 很多人小时候有很多梦想，但是长大后因为害怕失败就放弃了，其实只要一步一步努力，梦想就有可能实现。 Hěnduō rén xiǎoshíhou yǒu hěnduō mèngxiǎng, dànshì zhǎng dà hòu yīnwèi hàipà shībài jiù fàngqì le, qíshí zhǐyào yī bù yī bù nǔlì, mèngxiǎng jiù yǒu kěnéng shíxiàn.
ex_zh: Many people had many dreams when they were young, but after growing up they give up because they are afraid of failure; actually, as long as you work hard step by step, your dreams may come true.

quote_en: 我们要勇敢面对困难。 Wǒmen yào yǒnggǎn miànduì kùnnán.
quote_zh: We must face difficulties bravely.
ex_en: 考试失败的时候，不要逃避，要冷静地面对自己的问题，找到原因，下次才能考得更好。 Kǎoshì shībài de shíhou, bùyào táobì, yào lěngjìng de miànduì zìjǐ de wèntí, zhǎodào yuányīn, xià cì cáinéng kǎo de gèng hǎo.
ex_zh: When you fail an exam, don’t run away; calmly face your own problems, find the reason, and next time you can do better.

quote_en: 我明白你的意思。 Wǒ míngbái nǐ de yìsi.
quote_zh: I understand what you mean.
ex_en: 小时候我不明白为什么妈妈总让我早睡，现在我明白了，充足的睡眠对健康和学习都很重要。 Xiǎoshíhou wǒ bù míngbái wèishénme māma zǒng ràng wǒ zǎo shuì, xiànzài wǒ míngbái le, chōngzú de shuìmián duì jiànkāng hé xuéxí dōu hěn zhòngyào.
ex_zh: When I was little I didn’t understand why Mom always made me sleep early; now I understand that adequate sleep is very important for health and study.

quote_en: 你学习的目的什么？ Nǐ xuéxí de mùdì shì shénme?
quote_zh: What is the purpose of your study?
ex_en: 很多人旅行的目的是拍照发朋友圈，但是我觉得真正的目的是放松心情、体验不同的文化。 Hěnduō rén lǚxíng de mùdì shì pāizhào fā péngyouquān, dànshì wǒ juéde zhēnzhèng de mùdì shì fàngsōng xīnqíng, tǐyàn bùtóng de wénhuà.
ex_zh: Many people travel with the purpose of taking photos and posting them on social media, but I think the real purpose is to relax and experience different cultures.

def_zh: 学习能力；解决问题的能力
quote_en: 他的学习能力很强。 Tā de xuéxí nénglì hěn qiáng.
quote_zh: His learning ability is very strong.
ex_en: 在学校里，我们不仅要提高学习能力，还要学会和朋友合作，这些能力将来工作的时候也很有用。 Zài xuéxiào lǐ, wǒmen bùjǐn yào tígāo xuéxí nénglì, hái yào xuéhuì hé péngyou hézuò, zhèxiē nénglì jiānglái gōngzuò de shíhou yě hěn yǒuyòng.
ex_zh: At school, we not only need to improve our learning ability, but also learn to cooperate with friends; these abilities will also be very useful when we work in the future.

quote_en: 年轻人要努力学习。 Niánqīng rén yào nǔlì xuéxí.
quote_zh: Young people must study hard.
ex_en: 虽然我年纪轻，经验不多，但是我相信只要多问、多学，将来一定能做好自己想做的事。 Suīrán wǒ niánjì qīng, jīngyàn bù duō, dànshì wǒ xiāngxìn zhǐyào duō wèn, duō xué, jiānglái yīdìng néng zuò hǎo zìjǐ xiǎng zuò de shì.
ex_zh: Although I am young and don’t have much experience, I believe that as long as I ask more and learn more, I will surely be able to do what I want to do in the future.

quote_en: 他是一个努力的学生。 Tā shì yī gè nǔlì de xuésheng.
quote_zh: He is a hard-working student.
ex_en: 有些人很聪明但不努力，结果成绩不好；有些人虽然不聪明，但是很努力，最后反而成功了。 Yǒuxiē rén hěn cōngmíng dàn bù nǔlì, jiéguǒ chéngjì bù hǎo; yǒuxiē rén suīrán bù cōngmíng, dànshì hěn nǔlì, zuìhòu fǎn'ér chénggōng le.
ex_zh: Some people are very smart but don’t work hard, and as a result their grades are poor; some people are not smart but work very hard, and in the end they succeed instead.

quote_en: 我喜欢爬山。 Wǒ xǐhuān pá shān.
quote_zh: I like to climb mountains.
ex_en: 上个周末我和爸爸去爬山，开始觉得很累，但是爬到山顶看到美丽的风景，感觉一切都值得了。 Shàng gè zhōumò wǒ hé bàba qù pá shān, kāishǐ juéde hěn lèi, dànshì pá dào shāndǐng kàndào měilì de fēngjǐng, gǎnjué yīqiè dōu zhíde le.
ex_zh: Last weekend I went mountain climbing with my dad; at first I felt very tired, but when we reached the top and saw the beautiful scenery, it felt like everything was worth it.

quote_en: 请排队上车。 Qǐng páiduì shàng chē.
quote_zh: Please line up to get on the bus.
ex_en: 很多年轻人不喜欢排队，觉得浪费时间，但是排队是一种礼貌，也是对别人的尊重。 Hěnduō niánqīng rén bù xǐhuān páiduì, juéde làngfèi shíjiān, dànshì páiduì shì yī zhǒng lǐmào, yě shì duì biérén de zūnzhòng.
ex_zh: Many young people don’t like to line up, thinking it’s a waste of time, but lining up is a form of politeness and also a sign of respect for others.

quote_en: 我平常七点起床。 Wǒ píngcháng qī diǎn qǐchuáng.
quote_zh: I usually get up at seven o’clock.
ex_en: 很多人想要不平凡的生活，但是我觉得能把平常的日子过好，和家人朋友开开心心地在一起，就是最大的幸福。 Hěnduō rén xiǎng yào bù píngfán de shēnghuó, dànshì wǒ juéde néng bǎ píngcháng de rìzi guò hǎo, hé jiārén péngyou kāikāixīn xīn de zài yīqǐ, jiùshì zuìdà de xìngfú.
ex_zh: Many people want an extraordinary life, but I think being able to live ordinary days well, happily together with family and friends, is the greatest happiness.

quote_en: 每个人都应该平等。 Měi gè rén dōu yīnggāi píngděng.
quote_zh: Everyone should be equal.
ex_en: 在学校里，老师对男生和女生应该平等，给每个人同样的机会回答问题。 Zài xuéxiào lǐ, lǎoshī duì nánshēng hé nǚshēng yīnggāi píngděng, gěi měi gè rén tóngyàng de jīhuì huídá wèntí.
ex_zh: At school, teachers should treat boys and girls equally, giving everyone the same opportunity to answer questions.

quote_en: 这个问题其实不难。 Zhège wèntí qíshí bù nán.
quote_zh: This problem is actually not difficult.
ex_en: 很多人以为学中文很难，其实只要找到有趣的方法，比如看动画片、听中文歌，就会变得很有意思。 Hěnduō rén yǐwéi xué Zhōngwén hěn nán, qíshí zhǐyào zhǎodào yǒuqù de fāngfǎ, bǐrú kàn dònghuà piàn, tīng Zhōngwén gē, jiù huì biàn de hěn yǒuyìsi.
ex_zh: Many people think learning Chinese is very difficult, but actually as long as you find interesting methods, such as watching cartoons or listening to Chinese songs, it becomes very enjoyable.

quote_en: 我们一起庆祝新年。 Wǒmen yīqǐ qìngzhù xīnnián.
quote_zh: We celebrate the New Year together.
ex_en: 庆祝生日不一定要买很贵的礼物，和家人一起吃顿饭、聊聊天，也是一种很温暖的庆祝方式。 Qìngzhù shēngrì bù yīdìng yào mǎi hěn guì de lǐwù, hé jiārén yīqǐ chī dùn fàn, liáoliao tiān, yě shì yī zhǒng hěn wēnnuǎn de qìngzhù fāngshì.
ex_zh: Celebrating a birthday doesn’t have to involve buying expensive gifts; having a meal with family and chatting is also a very warm way to celebrate.

quote_en: 街上真热闹。 Jiēshàng zhēn rènao.
quote_zh: The street is really lively.
ex_en: 过年的时候，街上特别热闹，大家都在放鞭炮、吃饺子，我喜欢这种一家人在一起的感觉。 Guònián de shíhou, jiēshàng tèbié rènao, dàjiā dōu zài fàng biānpào, chī jiǎozi, wǒ xǐhuān zhè zhǒng yī jiā rén zài yīqǐ de gǎnjué.
ex_zh: During the Chinese New Year, the streets are especially lively; everyone is setting off firecrackers and eating dumplings; I love this feeling of the whole family being together.

quote_en: 他做事很认真。 Tā zuòshì hěn rènzhēn.
quote_zh: He does things very seriously.
ex_en: 很多学生上课不认真听讲，回家后要花很多时间自己看书，其实认真听课反而能省下更多时间玩。 Hěnduō xuésheng shàngkè bù rènzhēn tīngjiǎng, huí jiā hòu yào huā hěnduō shíjiān zìjǐ kàn shū, qíshí rènzhēn tīngkè fǎn'ér néng shěng xià gèng duō shíjiān wán.
ex_zh: Many students don’t listen carefully in class, then spend a lot of time reading at home; actually, listening carefully in class saves more time for playing.

quote_en: 这件商品很便宜。 Zhè jiàn shāngpǐn hěn piányi.
quote_zh: This commodity is very cheap.
ex_en: 很多人在网上买商品，因为网上比商店便宜，但是要注意看评价，不要买到不好的东西。 Hěnduō rén zài wǎngshàng mǎi shāngpǐn, yīnwèi wǎngshàng bǐ shāngdiàn piányi, dànshì yào zhùyì kàn píngjià, bùyào mǎi dào bù hǎo de dōngxi.
ex_zh: Many people buy goods online because it’s cheaper than in stores, but you need to check the reviews and not buy bad products.

quote_en: 社会在不断发展。 Shèhuì zài bùduàn fāzhǎn.
quote_zh: Society is constantly developing.
ex_en: 每个人都应该关心社会，帮助有困难的人，比如给流浪的人送一些吃的，这样社会会更温暖。 Měi gè rén dōu yīnggāi guānxīn shèhuì, bāngzhù yǒu kùnnán de rén, bǐrú gěi liúlàng de rén sòng yīxiē chī de, zhèyàng shèhuì huì gèng wēnnuǎn.
ex_zh: Everyone should care about society and help people in need, for example giving some food to homeless people; this will make society warmer.

quote_en: 他设计了一件漂亮的衣服。 Tā shèjì le yī jiàn piàoliang de yīfu.
quote_zh: He designed a beautiful piece of clothing.
ex_en: 学校举办了一个设计比赛，我和朋友一起设计了一张海报，虽然没有得奖，但是我们玩得很开心。 Xuéxiào jǔbàn le yī gè shèjì bǐsài, wǒ hé péngyou yīqǐ shèjì le yī zhāng hǎibào, suīrán méiyǒu dé jiǎng, dànshì wǒmen wán de hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: The school held a design competition; my friend and I designed a poster together. Although we didn’t win a prize, we had a lot of fun.

quote_en: 生命很宝贵。 Shēngmìng hěn bǎoguì.
quote_zh: Life is very precious.
ex_en: 我们要珍惜生命，每天早睡早起、多运动，这样才能有一个健康的身体，去做自己想做的事。 Wǒmen yào zhēnxī shēngmìng, měitiān zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ, duō yùndòng, zhèyàng cáinéng yǒu yī gè jiànkāng de shēntǐ, qù zuò zìjǐ xiǎng zuò de shì.
ex_zh: We must cherish life, sleep and wake up early every day, and exercise more; only then can we have a healthy body to do what we want to do.

quote_en: 他家的生意很好。 Tā jiā de shēngyì hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: His family’s business is doing well.
ex_en: 妈妈在网上开了一家小店，卖自己做的手工包，生意越来越好，她很开心。 Māma zài wǎngshàng kāi le yī jiā xiǎo diàn, mài zìjǐ zuò de shǒugōng bāo, shēngyì yuè lái yuè hǎo, tā hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Mom opened a small online shop selling handmade bags she makes herself; the business is getting better and better, and she is very happy.

quote_en: 她的声音很好听。 Tā de shēngyīn hěn hǎotīng.
quote_zh: Her voice is very pleasant.
ex_en: 上课的时候，老师的声音很大，坐在最后一排的同学也能听清楚，这样大家都能学到知识。 Shàngkè de shíhou, lǎoshī de shēngyīn hěn dà, zuò zài zuìhòu yī pái de tóngxué yě néng tīng qīngchu, zhèyàng dàjiā dōu néng xué dào zhīshi.
ex_zh: During class, the teacher’s voice is very loud, so even students sitting in the last row can hear clearly; this way everyone can learn.

quote_en: 世界很大。 Shìjiè hěn dà.
quote_zh: The world is very big.
ex_en: 我想去世界各地旅行，看看不同的风景，尝尝不同的美食，交很多外国朋友。 Wǒ xiǎng qù shìjiè gèdì lǚxíng, kànkan bùtóng de fēngjǐng, chángchang bùtóng de měishí, jiāo hěnduō wàiguó péngyou.
ex_zh: I want to travel around the world, see different sceneries, taste different foods, and make many foreign friends.

quote_en: 你要说出事实。 Nǐ yào shuō chū shìshí.
quote_zh: You need to tell the facts.
ex_en: 很多人在网上看到什么就信什么，但是我们应该先查一查是不是事实，不要随便乱传。 Hěnduō rén zài wǎngshàng kàndào shénme jiù xìn shénme, dànshì wǒmen yīnggāi xiān chá yī chá shì bùshì shìshí, bùyào suíbiàn luàn chuán.
ex_zh: Many people believe whatever they see online, but we should first check whether it’s a fact and not casually spread things.

quote_en: 请正确使用电脑。 Qǐng zhèngquè shǐyòng diànnǎo.
quote_zh: Please use the computer correctly.
ex_en: 很多老人不会使用智能手机，我们可以耐心地教他们，让他们也能跟家人视频聊天。 Hěnduō lǎorén bù huì shǐyòng zhìnéng shǒujī, wǒmen kěyǐ nàixīn de jiāo tāmen, ràng tāmen yě néng gēn jiārén shìpín liáotiān.
ex_zh: Many elderly people don’t know how to use smartphones; we can patiently teach them so that they can also video chat with family.

quote_en: 他的家庭收入不高。 Tā de jiātíng shōurù bù gāo.
quote_zh: His family’s income is not high.
ex_en: 很多人想赚很多钱，但是我觉得收入够用就好，更重要的是身体健康、家人平安。 Hěnduō rén xiǎng zhuàn hěnduō qián, dànshì wǒ juéde shōurù gòu yòng jiù hǎo, gèng zhòngyào de shì shēntǐ jiànkāng, jiārén píng'ān.
ex_zh: Many people want to earn a lot of money, but I think having enough income is fine; what’s more important is good health and a safe family.

quote_en: 他的中文水平很高。 Tā de Zhōngwén shuǐpíng hěn gāo.
quote_zh: His Chinese level is very high.
ex_en: 想要提高中文水平，最好的办法是每天跟中国人聊天，多说多听，不用怕说错。 Xiǎng yào tígāo Zhōngwén shuǐpíng, zuì hǎo de bànfǎ shì měitiān gēn Zhōngguó rén liáotiān, duō shuō duō tīng, bùyòng pà shuō cuò.
ex_zh: If you want to improve your Chinese level, the best way is to chat with Chinese people every day, speak and listen a lot, and don’t be afraid of making mistakes.

quote_en: 他的学习态度很好。 Tā de xuéxí tàidù hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: His learning attitude is very good.
ex_en: 面对困难时，态度很重要；积极的人会想办法，消极的人只会抱怨，所以我们要保持好心态。 Miànduì kùnnán shí, tàidù hěn zhòngyào; jījí de rén huì xiǎng bànfǎ, xiāojí de rén zhǐ huì bàoyuàn, suǒyǐ wǒmen yào bǎochí hǎo xīntài.
ex_zh: When facing difficulties, attitude is very important; positive people find solutions, negative people only complain, so we need to keep a good mindset.

quote_en: 我们一起讨论问题。 Wǒmen yīqǐ tǎolùn wèntí.
quote_zh: Let’s discuss the problem together.
ex_en: 上课时老师让我们分组讨论，大家说了不同的想法，最后找到了最好的答案。 Shàngkè shí lǎoshī ràng wǒmen fēnzǔ tǎolùn, dàjiā shuō le bùtóng de xiǎngfǎ, zuìhòu zhǎodào le zuì hǎo de dá'àn.
ex_zh: In class, the teacher asked us to discuss in groups; everyone shared different ideas, and finally we found the best answer.

quote_en: 他提出了一个好建议。 Tā tíchū le yī gè hǎo jiànyì.
quote_zh: He put forward a good suggestion.
ex_en: 开会的时候，小王提出了一个问题，大家都很感兴趣，然后一起想办法解决。 Kāihuì de shíhou, Xiǎo Wáng tíchū le yī gè wèntí, dàjiā dōu hěn gǎn xìngqù, ránhòu yīqǐ xiǎng bànfǎ jiějué.
ex_zh: During the meeting, Xiao Wang put forward a question; everyone was very interested, and then they worked together to find a solution.

def_en: to experience, to learn from experience
quote_en: 我想体验一下农村生活。 Wǒ xiǎng tǐyàn yīxià nóngcūn shēnghuó.
quote_zh: I want to experience rural life.
ex_en: 去年我去农场体验了喂羊、摘苹果，虽然有点累，但是我学到了很多课本上没有的东西。 Qùnián wǒ qù nóngchǎng tǐyàn le wèi yáng, zhāi píngguǒ, suīrán yǒudiǎn lèi, dànshì wǒ xué dào le hěnduō kèběn shàng méiyǒu de dōngxi.
ex_zh: Last year I went to a farm to experience feeding sheep and picking apples; although it was a bit tiring, I learned many things not in textbooks.

quote_en: 这个西瓜很甜。 Zhège xīguā hěn tián.
quote_zh: This watermelon is very sweet.
ex_en: 奶奶做的汤很甜，因为她放了很多红枣和枸杞，我觉得这是家的味道。 Nǎinai zuò de tāng hěn tián, yīnwèi tā fàng le hěnduō hóngzǎo hé gǒuqǐ, wǒ juéde zhè shì jiā de wèidào.
ex_zh: The soup Grandma makes is very sweet because she puts in a lot of red dates and goji berries; I think this is the taste of home.

def_zh: 蓝色的天空；晴朗的天空
quote_en: 今天的天空很蓝。 Jīntiān de tiānkōng hěn lán.
quote_zh: Today’s sky is very blue.
ex_en: 晚上我常常抬头看天空，如果有很多星星，我就会很开心，觉得世界真美。 Wǎnshàng wǒ chángcháng tái tóu kàn tiānkōng, rúguǒ yǒu hěnduō xīngxing, wǒ jiù huì hěn kāixīn, juéde shìjiè zhēn měi.
ex_zh: At night I often look up at the sky; if there are many stars, I feel very happy and think the world is beautiful.

quote_en: 他家的条件不太好。 Tā jiā de tiáojiàn bù tài hǎo.
quote_zh: His family’s conditions are not very good.
ex_en: 很多人觉得学习需要好条件，但是我觉得只要有一颗努力的心，没有条件也能学好。 Hěnduō rén juéde xuéxí xūyào hǎo tiáojiàn, dànshì wǒ juéde zhǐyào yǒu yī kē nǔlì de xīn, méiyǒu tiáojiàn yě néng xué hǎo.
ex_zh: Many people think learning requires good conditions, but I think as long as you have a hard-working heart, you can learn well even without conditions.

quote_en: 我需要调整一下计划。 Wǒ xūyào tiáozhěng yīxià jìhuà.
quote_zh: I need to adjust my plan.
ex_en: 考试前我调整了作息时间，每天早睡早起，这样考试的时候精神更好。 Kǎoshì qián wǒ tiáozhěng le zuòxī shíjiān, měitiān zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ, zhèyàng kǎoshì de shíhou jīngshén gèng hǎo.
ex_zh: Before the exam, I adjusted my daily schedule, sleeping and waking up early every day, so that I had more energy during the exam.

quote_en: 突然下雨了。 Tūrán xià yǔ le.
quote_zh: It suddenly started raining.
ex_en: 昨天我在路上走，突然遇到了小学的同学，我们好久没见，聊了很久，很开心。 Zuótiān wǒ zài lù shàng zǒu, tūrán yùdào le xiǎoxué de tóngxué, wǒmen hǎo jiǔ méi jiàn, liáo le hěn jiǔ, hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Yesterday I was walking on the street when I suddenly ran into a classmate from primary school; we hadn’t seen each other for a long time, so we chatted for a long time and were very happy.

quote_en: 我完成了作业。 Wǒ wánchéng le zuòyè.
quote_zh: I have completed my homework.
ex_en: 每天放学前，我都会检查自己是否完成了所有任务，这样回家就能安心看电视了。 Měitiān fàngxué qián, wǒ dōu huì jiǎnchá zìjǐ shìfǒu wánchéng le suǒyǒu rènwu, zhèyàng huí jiā jiù néng ānxīn kàn diànshì le.
ex_zh: Every day before school ends, I check whether I have completed all my tasks; this way I can relax and watch TV when I get home.

quote_en: 没有完美的人。 Méiyǒu wánměi de rén.
quote_zh: There is no perfect person.
ex_en: 很多人追求完美，但是我觉得不完美也没关系，只要努力了，就是最好的自己。 Hěnduō rén zhuīqiú wánměi, dànshì wǒ juéde bù wánměi yě méi guānxi, zhǐyào nǔlì le, jiùshì zuì hǎo de zìjǐ.
ex_zh: Many people pursue perfection, but I think it’s okay not to be perfect; as long as you have tried your best, you are the best version of yourself.

quote_en: 我忘记带钥匙了。 Wǒ wàngjì dài yàoshi le.
quote_zh: I forgot to bring my keys.
ex_en: 妈妈让我买一瓶酱油，结果我忘记了，回到家才想起来，只好又跑了一趟。 Māma ràng wǒ mǎi yī píng jiàngyóu, jiéguǒ wǒ wàngjì le, huí dào jiā cái xiǎng qǐlái, zhǐhǎo yòu pǎo le yī tàng.
ex_zh: Mom asked me to buy a bottle of soy sauce, but I forgot; I only remembered after getting home, so I had to run back again.

quote_en: 过马路很危险。 Guò mǎlù hěn wēixiǎn.
quote_zh: Crossing the road is dangerous.
ex_en: 小孩子不要自己去河边玩，因为水很深，很危险，一定要有大人在旁边。 Xiǎohái zi bùyào zìjǐ qù hé biān wán, yīnwèi shuǐ hěn shēn, hěn wēixiǎn, yīdìng yào yǒu dàrén zài pángbiān.
ex_zh: Children should not go play by the river alone, because the water is deep and dangerous; there must be an adult nearby.

quote_en: 冬天的阳光很温暖。 Dōngtiān de yángguāng hěn wēnnuǎn.
quote_zh: The winter sunlight is very warm.
ex_en: 每次我难过的时候，妈妈都会给我一个温暖的拥抱，让我觉得什么都不怕了。 Měi cì wǒ nánguò de shíhou, māma dōu huì gěi wǒ yī gè wēnnuǎn de yōngbào, ràng wǒ juéde shénme dōu bù pà le.
ex_zh: Every time I feel sad, Mom gives me a warm hug, making me feel like I’m not afraid of anything.

quote_en: 空气污染很严重。 Kōngqì wūrǎn hěn yánzhòng.
quote_zh: Air pollution is very serious.
ex_en: 为了减少污染，我们可以少开车、多走路，还要做好垃圾分类，保护我们的地球。 Wèile jiǎnshǎo wūrǎn, wǒmen kěyǐ shǎo kāichē, duō zǒulù, hái yào zuò hǎo lājī fēnlèi, bǎohù wǒmen de dìqiú.
ex_zh: To reduce pollution, we can drive less, walk more, and also sort our rubbish properly to protect our Earth.

quote_en: 早睡是好习惯。 Zǎo shuì shì hǎo xíguàn.
quote_zh: Sleeping early is a good habit.
ex_en: 我习惯了每天早上读十分钟中文，虽然开始有点难，但是坚持下来后，我的中文进步了很多。 Wǒ xíguàn le měitiān zǎoshang dú shí fēnzhōng Zhōngwén, suīrán kāishǐ yǒudiǎn nán, dànshì jiānchí xiàlái hòu, wǒ de Zhōngwén jìnbù le hěnduō.
ex_zh: I’m used to reading Chinese for ten minutes every morning; although it was a bit difficult at first, after persisting, my Chinese has improved a lot.

quote_en: 我希望明天是晴天。 Wǒ xīwàng míngtiān shì qíngtiān.
quote_zh: I hope tomorrow will be sunny.
ex_en: 生活中总会有困难，但是只要心中还有希望，我们就不会放弃，就能找到前进的力量。 Shēnghuó zhōng zǒng huì yǒu kùnnán, dànshì zhǐyào xīnzhōng hái yǒu xīwàng, wǒmen jiù bù huì fàngqì, jiù néng zhǎodào qiánjìn de lìliàng.
ex_zh: There are always difficulties in life, but as long as we still have hope in our hearts, we won’t give up and can find the strength to move forward.

quote_en: 现代科技很方便。 Xiàndài kējì hěn fāngbiàn.
quote_zh: Modern technology is very convenient.
ex_en: 在现代社会，人们用手机做很多事，比如付钱、看地图、和朋友聊天，生活比以前方便多了。 Zài xiàndài shèhuì, rénmen yòng shǒujī zuò hěnduō shì, bǐrú fù qián, kàn dìtú, hé péngyou liáotiān, shēnghuó bǐ yǐqián fāngbiàn duō le.
ex_zh: In modern society, people use phones to do many things, such as paying, looking at maps, and chatting with friends; life is much more convenient than before.

quote_en: 现实很残酷。 Xiànshí hěn cánkù.
quote_zh: Reality is very cruel.
ex_en: 很多年轻人喜欢做梦，但是我觉得也要面对现实，只有脚踏实地，才能把梦想变成真的。 Hěnduō niánqīng rén xǐhuān zuò mèng, dànshì wǒ juéde yě yào miànduì xiànshí, zhǐyǒu jiǎotàshídì, cáinéng bǎ mèngxiǎng biàn chéng zhēn de.
ex_zh: Many young people like to dream, but I think we also need to face reality; only by being down-to-earth can we turn our dreams into reality.

quote_en: 我想到了一个好办法。 Wǒ xiǎngdào le yī gè hǎo bànfǎ.
quote_zh: I thought of a good solution.
ex_en: 每次看到这张照片，我就想到小时候和爷爷奶奶一起生活的日子，那时候真的很开心。 Měi cì kàn dào zhè zhāng zhàopiàn, wǒ jiù xiǎngdào xiǎoshíhou hé yéye nǎinai yīqǐ shēnghuó de rìzi, nà shíhou zhēn de hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Every time I see this photo, I think of the days when I lived with my grandparents as a child; those were really happy times.

quote_en: 我有一个好想法。 Wǒ yǒu yī gè hǎo xiǎngfǎ.
quote_zh: I have a good idea.
ex_en: 每个人的想法都不一样，我们应该尊重别人，耐心听他们说完，这样大家才能成为好朋友。 Měi gè rén de xiǎngfǎ dōu bù yīyàng, wǒmen yīnggāi zūnzhòng biérén, nàixīn tīng tāmen shuō wán, zhèyàng dàjiā cáinéng chéngwéi hǎo péngyou.
ex_zh: Everyone’s ideas are different; we should respect others and listen patiently until they finish, so that everyone can become good friends.

quote_en: 我今天心情很好。 Wǒ jīntiān xīnqíng hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: I am in a very good mood today.
ex_en: 听音乐可以改变心情，难过的时候听一首喜欢的歌，感觉就会好很多。 Tīng yīnyuè kěyǐ gǎibiàn xīnqíng, nánguò de shíhou tīng yī shǒu xǐhuān de gē, gǎnjué jiù huì hǎo hěnduō.
ex_zh: Listening to music can change your mood; when you feel sad, listening to a song you like can make you feel much better.

quote_en: 这个水果很新鲜。 Zhège shuǐguǒ hěn xīnxiān.
quote_zh: This fruit is very fresh.
ex_en: 城市里的空气不如农村新鲜，所以我周末常常去公园散步，呼吸新鲜空气。 Chéngshì lǐ de kōngqì bùrú nóngcūn xīnxiān, suǒyǐ wǒ zhōumò chángcháng qù gōngyuán sànbù, hūxī xīnxiān kōngqì.
ex_zh: The air in the city is not as fresh as in the countryside, so I often go to the park on weekends to walk and breathe fresh air.

quote_en: 和家人一起很幸福。 Hé jiārén yīqǐ hěn xìngfú.
quote_zh: Being with family is very happy.
ex_en: 很多人觉得有钱就是幸福，但是我觉得健康、朋友和家人的关心比钱更重要。 Hěnduō rén juéde yǒu qián jiùshì xìngfú, dànshì wǒ juéde jiànkāng, péngyou hé jiārén de guānxīn bǐ qián gèng zhòngyào.
ex_zh: Many people think having money is happiness, but I think health, friends, and family’s care are more important than money.

quote_en: 你真的很幸运。 Nǐ zhēn de hěn xìngyùn.
quote_zh: You are really lucky.
ex_en: 我能遇到这么好的老师和同学，真的很幸运，我会好好珍惜这份缘分。 Wǒ néng yùdào zhème hǎo de lǎoshī hé tóngxué, zhēn de hěn xìngyùn, wǒ huì hǎohǎo zhēnxī zhè fèn yuánfèn.
ex_zh: I am really lucky to have met such good teachers and classmates; I will cherish this connection.

quote_en: 我需要一杯水。 Wǒ xūyào yī bēi shuǐ.
quote_zh: I need a glass of water.
ex_en: 每个人都需要朋友，难过的时候有人陪，开心的时候有人分享，生活才会更有意思。 Měi gè rén dōu xūyào péngyou, nánguò de shíhou yǒu rén péi, kāixīn de shíhou yǒu rén fēnxiǎng, shēnghuó cái huì gèng yǒuyìsi.
ex_zh: Everyone needs friends; when you are sad, someone accompanies you; when you are happy, someone shares it with you; then life becomes more interesting.

quote_en: 你选择哪一个？ Nǐ xuǎnzé nǎ yī gè?
quote_zh: Which one do you choose?
ex_en: 人生中会有很多选择，选错了也没关系，重要的是从中学到东西，下次做得更好。 Rénshēng zhōng huì yǒu hěnduō xuǎnzé, xuǎn cuò le yě méi guānxi, zhòngyào de shì cóng zhōng xué dào dōngxi, xià cì zuò de gèng hǎo.
ex_zh: In life there will be many choices; it doesn’t matter if you choose wrong; what matters is learning from it and doing better next time.

quote_en: 他的成绩一般。 Tā de chéngjì yībān.
quote_zh: His grades are average.
ex_en: 一般人都会选择离家近的学校，但是我愿意去远一点的地方学习，因为那里的老师更好。 Yībān rén dōu huì xuǎnzé lí jiā jìn de xuéxiào, dànshì wǒ yuànyì qù yuǎn yī diǎn de dìfāng xuéxí, yīnwèi nàlǐ de lǎoshī gèng hǎo.
ex_zh: Most people would choose a school close to home, but I am willing to go a bit farther to study because the teachers there are better.

quote_en: 他们移民到了新西兰。 Tāmen yímín dào le Xīnxīlán.
quote_zh: They immigrated to New Zealand.
ex_en: 我的邻居是一户移民家庭，刚来的时候中文不好，但是经过努力，现在他们已经能流利地聊天了。 Wǒ de línjū shì yī hù yímín jiātíng, gāng lái de shíhou Zhōngwén bù hǎo, dànshì jīngguò nǔlì, xiànzài tāmen yǐjīng néng liúlì de liáotiān le.
ex_zh: My neighbors are an immigrant family; when they first arrived, their Chinese was not good, but after hard work, they can now chat fluently.

quote_en: 这件事很有意义。 Zhè jiàn shì hěn yǒu yìyì.
quote_zh: This matter is very meaningful.
ex_en: 很多人不知道学习的意义是什么，我觉得学习是为了将来有更多选择，不用让别人替你做决定。 Hěnduō rén bù zhīdào xuéxí de yìyì shì shénme, wǒ juéde xuéxí shì wèile jiānglái yǒu gèng duō xuǎnzé, bùyòng ràng biérén tì nǐ zuò juédìng.
ex_zh: Many people don’t know what the meaning of learning is; I think learning is to have more choices in the future, so you don’t have to let others make decisions for you.

quote_en: 他给我的印象很好。 Tā gěi wǒ de yìnxiàng hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: He left a very good impression on me.
ex_en: 第一次见面时，他帮我拿行李，这个小小的举动给我留下了很深的印象。 Dì yī cì jiànmiàn shí, tā bāng wǒ ná xíngli, zhège xiǎoxiǎo de jǔdòng gěi wǒ liúxià le hěn shēn de yìnxiàng.
ex_zh: When we first met, he helped me carry my luggage; this small gesture left a deep impression on me.

quote_en: 我在街上遇到了老师。 Wǒ zài jiēshàng yùdào le lǎoshī.
quote_zh: I encountered the teacher on the street.
ex_en: 遇到困难的时候，不要害怕，可以找朋友或家人帮忙，大家一起想办法，问题就容易解决了。 Yùdào kùnnán de shíhou, bùyào hàipà, kěyǐ zhǎo péngyou huò jiārén bāngmáng, dàjiā yīqǐ xiǎng bànfǎ, wèntí jiù róngyì jiějué le.
ex_zh: When you encounter difficulties, don’t be afraid; you can ask friends or family for help; everyone working together makes problems easier to solve.

quote_en: 我们约了周六见面。 Wǒmen yuē le zhōuliù jiànmiàn.
quote_zh: We made an appointment to meet on Saturday.
ex_en: 和朋友约会要准时，不要让别人等你，这是对朋友最基本的尊重。 Hé péngyou yuēhuì yào zhǔnshí, bùyào ràng biérén děng nǐ, zhè shì duì péngyou zuì jīběn de zūnzhòng.
ex_zh: When you have an appointment with friends, you should be on time and not keep others waiting; this is the most basic respect for friends.

quote_en: 这是一次正式会议。 Zhè shì yī cì zhèngshì huìyì.
quote_zh: This is a formal meeting.
ex_en: 在正式场合，我们要穿校服，说话也要注意礼貌，这代表我们对别人的尊重。 Zài zhèngshì chǎnghé, wǒmen yào chuān xiàofú, shuōhuà yě yào zhùyì lǐmào, zhè dàibiǎo wǒmen duì biérén de zūnzhòng.
ex_zh: In formal situations, we need to wear school uniforms and be polite when speaking; this shows our respect for others.

quote_en: 父母支持我的选择。 Fùmǔ zhīchí wǒ de xuǎnzé.
quote_zh: My parents support my choice.
ex_en: 好朋友之间要互相支持，当你遇到困难时，朋友的支持会让你更有信心。 Hǎo péngyou zhī jiān yào hùxiāng zhīchí, dāng nǐ yùdào kùnnán shí, péngyou de zhīchí huì ràng nǐ gèng yǒu xìnxīn.
ex_zh: Good friends should support each other; when you encounter difficulties, a friend’s support will give you more confidence.

quote_en: 我想当志愿者。 Wǒ xiǎng dāng zhìyuànzhě.
quote_zh: I want to be a volunteer.
ex_en: 每个周末我都去医院做志愿者，帮忙照顾老人，虽然有点累，但是我觉得很有意义。 Měi gè zhōumò wǒ dōu qù yīyuàn zuò zhìyuànzhě, bāngmáng zhàogù lǎorén, suīrán yǒudiǎn lèi, dànshì wǒ juéde hěn yǒu yìyì.
ex_zh: Every weekend I volunteer at the hospital, helping take care of the elderly; although it’s a bit tiring, I find it very meaningful.

quote_en: 下雨了，我们只好回家。 Xià yǔ le, wǒmen zhǐhǎo huí jiā.
quote_zh: It started raining, so we had no choice but to go home.
ex_en: 本来想去公园玩，但是突然下雨了，我们只好改变计划，在家看电影。 Běnlái xiǎng qù gōngyuán wán, dànshì tūrán xià yǔ le, wǒmen zhǐhǎo gǎibiàn jìhuà, zài jiā kàn diànyǐng.
ex_zh: We originally wanted to go to the park, but it suddenly started raining, so we had no choice but to change our plans and watch a movie at home.

quote_en: 我终于做完作业了。 Wǒ zhōngyú zuò wán zuòyè le.
quote_zh: I finally finished my homework.
ex_en: 经过三个月的努力练习，我终于学会了弹吉他，心里特别开心。 Jīngguò sān gè yuè de nǔlì liànxí, wǒ zhōngyú xuéhuì le tán jítā, xīn lǐ tèbié kāixīn.
ex_zh: After three months of hard practice, I finally learned to play the guitar; I felt very happy inside.

quote_en: 过马路要注意安全。 Guò mǎlù yào zhùyì ānquán.
quote_zh: When crossing the road, pay attention to safety.
ex_en: 上课的时候要注意听老师讲课，不要玩手机，这样才能学到知识，考试也能考好。 Shàngkè de shíhou yào zhùyì tīng lǎoshī jiǎngkè, bùyào wán shǒujī, zhèyàng cáinéng xué dào zhīshi, kǎoshì yě néng kǎo hǎo.
ex_zh: In class, pay attention to the teacher’s lecture and don’t play with your phone; only then can you learn knowledge and do well on exams.

quote_en: 她的笑容很自然。 Tā de xiàoróng hěn zìrán.
quote_zh: Her smile is very natural.
ex_en: 我们要保护自然，不乱扔垃圾，多种树，这样我们的地球才会更美丽。 Wǒmen yào bǎohù zìrán, bù luàn rēng lājī, duō zhòng shù, zhèyàng wǒmen de dìqiú cái huì gèng měilì.
ex_zh: We need to protect nature, not litter, and plant more trees; only then will our Earth become more beautiful.

quote_en: 你要相信自己。 Nǐ yào xiāngxìn zìjǐ.
quote_zh: You need to believe in yourself.
ex_en: 第一次上台演讲的时候我很紧张，但是妈妈告诉我，要自信一点，后来我讲得很好，同学们都为我鼓掌。 Dì yī cì shàng tái yǎnjiǎng de shíhou wǒ hěn jǐnzhāng, dànshì māma gàosu wǒ, yào zìxìn yī diǎn, hòulái wǒ jiǎng de hěn hǎo, tóngxuémen dōu wèi wǒ gǔzhǎng.
ex_zh: The first time I gave a speech on stage I was very nervous, but Mom told me to be more confident; later I spoke very well, and all my classmates applauded for me.

quote_en: 我们有足够的时间。 Wǒmen yǒu zúgòu de shíjiān.
quote_zh: We have enough time.
ex_en: 只要你足够努力，就一定能实现自己的目标，不要因为别人比你强就放弃。 Zhǐyào nǐ zúgòu nǔlì, jiù yīdìng néng shíxiàn zìjǐ de mùbiāo, bùyào yīnwèi biérén bǐ nǐ qiáng jiù fàngqì.
ex_zh: As long as you work hard enough, you will certainly achieve your goals; don’t give up just because others are better than you.

quote_en: 这是他最好的作品。 Zhè shì tā zuì hǎo de zuòpǐn.
quote_zh: This is his best work.
ex_en: 每个人的生活都是自己的作品，重要的不是别人怎么看，而是你自己是否满意。 Měi gè rén de shēnghuó dōu shì zìjǐ de zuòpǐn, zhòngyào de bùshì biérén zěnme kàn, érshì nǐ zìjǐ shìfǒu mǎnyì.
ex_zh: Everyone’s life is their own work; what matters is not how others see it, but whether you yourself are satisfied.

pron: qīn rú yì jiā, qíng tóng shǒu zú
def_en: As close as one family, as close as brothers/sisters
quote_en: 我们班同学亲如一家。 Wǒmen bān tóngxué qīn rú yì jiā.
quote_zh: Our classmates are as close as one family.
ex_en: 虽然我们来自不同的地方，但是经过三年的相处，大家亲如一家，情同手足，这份友谊我会永远珍惜。 Suīrán wǒmen láizì bùtóng de dìfāng, dànshì jīngguò sān nián de xiāngchǔ, dàjiā qīn rú yì jiā, qíng tóng shǒu zú, zhè fèn yǒuyì wǒ huì yǒngyuǎn zhēnxī.
ex_zh: Although we come from different places, after three years together, we have become as close as one family, as close as brothers and sisters; I will always cherish this friendship.

def_en: When in Rome, do as the Romans do
quote_en: 去外国要入乡随俗。 Qù wàiguó yào rù xiāng suí sú.
quote_zh: When going abroad, you should follow local customs.
ex_en: 很多外国人刚来中国不习惯用筷子，但是入乡随俗，慢慢地他们就学会了，还觉得很有意思。 Hěnduō wàiguó rén gāng lái Zhōngguó bù xíguàn yòng kuàizi, dànshì rù xiāng suí sú, mànmàn de tāmen jiù xuéhuì le, hái juéde hěn yǒuyìsi.
ex_zh: Many foreigners are not used to using chopsticks when they first come to China, but when in Rome they do as the Romans do, and slowly they learn and even find it very interesting.

quote_en: 我们希望天下一家。 Wǒmen xīwàng tiān xià yì jiā.
quote_zh: We hope for a world as one family.
ex_en: 虽然世界上有不同的语言和文化，但是只要大家互相帮助、互相理解，就能实现天下一家的梦想。 Suīrán shìjiè shàng yǒu bùtóng de yǔyán hé wénhuà, dànshì zhǐyào dàjiā hùxiāng bāngzhù, hùxiāng lǐjiě, jiù néng shíxiàn tiān xià yì jiā de mèngxiǎng.
ex_zh: Although there are different languages and cultures in the world, as long as everyone helps and understands each other, we can realize the dream of the world as one family.

def_en: We are all in this together
quote_en: 困难时大家要同舟共济。 Kùnnán shí dàjiā yào tóng zhōu gòng jì.
quote_zh: When times are difficult, we must all be in this together.
ex_en: 面对疫情，全世界的人应该同舟共济，一起努力，才能早日战胜困难。 Miànduì yìqíng, quán shìjiè de rén yīnggāi tóng zhōu gòng jì, yīqǐ nǔlì, cáinéng zǎorì zhànshèng kùnnán.
ex_zh: Facing the pandemic, people around the world should be all in this together and work together; only then can we overcome the difficulties soon.

def_en: Respect the elderly and care for the young
quote_en: 我们要尊老爱幼。 Wǒmen yào zūn lǎo ài yòu.
quote_zh: We must respect the elderly and care for the young.
ex_en: 在公交车上给老人让座，帮助小孩子过马路，这些都是尊老爱幼的表现，也是中华民族的好传统。 Zài gōngjiāo chē shàng gěi lǎorén ràngzuò, bāngzhù xiǎohái zi guò mǎlù, zhèxiē dōu shì zūn lǎo ài yòu de biǎoxiàn, yě shì Zhōnghuá mínzú de hǎo chuántǒng.
ex_zh: Giving up your seat to the elderly on the bus and helping children cross the road are all manifestations of respecting the elderly and caring for the young, and are also good traditions of the Chinese nation.

def_zh: 扫描二维码；二维码支付
quote_en: 请扫一下二维码。 Qǐng sǎo yīxià èr wéi mǎ.
quote_zh: Please scan the QR code.
ex_en: 现在很多餐厅的桌子上都有二维码，用手机扫一下就能看到菜单，然后直接点菜。 Xiànzài hěnduō cāntīng de zhuōzi shàng dōu yǒu èr wéi mǎ, yòng shǒujī sǎo yīxià jiù néng kàndào càidān, ránhòu zhíjiē diǎn cài.
ex_zh: Nowadays many restaurant tables have QR codes; you can scan them with your phone to see the menu and then order directly.

def_zh: 电子支付方式；使用电子支付
quote_en: 电子支付很方便。 Diànzǐ zhīfù hěn fāngbiàn.
quote_zh: Electronic payment is very convenient.
ex_en: 很多人出门只带一部手机，因为电子支付可以买衣服、吃饭、坐车，几乎什么都能做。 Hěnduō rén chūmén zhǐ dài yī bù shǒujī, yīnwèi diànzǐ zhīfù kěyǐ mǎi yīfu, chīfàn, zuò chē, jǐhū shénme dōu néng zuò.
ex_zh: Many people only bring a phone when they go out, because electronic payment can buy clothes, meals, and transportation – almost everything.

quote_en: 我把照片上传到网上。 Wǒ bǎ zhàopiàn shàngchuán dào wǎngshàng.
quote_zh: I uploaded the photos online.
ex_en: 老师让我们把作业上传到学校的网站，这样她就可以在家里批改，不用把作业本带来带去了。 Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen bǎ zuòyè shàngchuán dào xuéxiào de wǎngzhàn, zhèyàng tā jiù kěyǐ zài jiā lǐ pīgǎi, bùyòng bǎ zuòyè běn dài lái dài qù le.
ex_zh: The teacher asked us to upload our homework to the school website, so she can mark it at home without carrying notebooks back and forth.

quote_en: 我在下载新游戏。 Wǒ zài xiàzǎi xīn yóuxì.
quote_zh: I am downloading a new game.
ex_en: 想学中文的话，可以下载一个学语言的软件，每天花十分钟练习，慢慢就会进步。 Xiǎng xué Zhōngwén dehuà, kěyǐ xiàzǎi yī gè xué yǔyán de ruǎnjiàn, měitiān huā shí fēnzhōng liànxí, mànmàn jiù huì jìnbù.
ex_zh: If you want to learn Chinese, you can download a language learning app, spend ten minutes practicing every day, and you will gradually improve.

quote_en: 我的手机流量用完了。 Wǒ de shǒujī liúliàng yòng wán le.
quote_zh: My phone data is used up.
ex_en: 很多人出门喜欢看视频，但是这样很费流量，最好先连上无线网络再看。 Hěnduō rén chūmén xǐhuān kàn shìpín, dànshì zhèyàng hěn fèi liúliàng, zuì hǎo xiān lián shàng wúxiàn wǎngluò zài kàn.
ex_zh: Many people like to watch videos when they go out, but that uses a lot of data; it’s best to connect to wifi first.

quote_en: 这个鼠标是无线的。 Zhège shǔbiāo shì wúxiàn de.
quote_zh: This mouse is wireless.
ex_en: 无线耳机用起来很方便，没有长长的线，跑步的时候也不会被绊到。 Wúxiàn ěrjī yòng qǐlái hěn fāngbiàn, méiyǒu cháng cháng de xiàn, pǎobù de shíhou yě bù huì bèi bàn dào.
ex_zh: Wireless earphones are very convenient to use; there are no long cords, and they won’t trip you when you run.

quote_en: 网络坏了，上不了网。 Wǎngluò huài le, shàng bù liǎo wǎng.
quote_zh: The internet is broken; I can’t get online.
ex_en: 现在的年轻人做什么都离不开网络，查资料、聊天、买东西，都在网上完成。 Xiànzài de niánqīng rén zuò shénme dōu lí bù kāi wǎngluò, chá zīliào, liáotiān, mǎi dōngxi, dōu zài wǎngshàng wánchéng.
ex_zh: Nowadays young people can’t do anything without the internet; searching for information, chatting, shopping – everything is done online.

def_zh: 连接无线网络；无线网络信号
quote_en: 这里有无线网络吗？ Zhè lǐ yǒu wúxiàn wǎngluò ma?
quote_zh: Is there wifi here?
ex_en: 去咖啡馆的时候，我通常会问服务员无线网络的密码，这样可以用电脑学习。 Qù kāfēiguǎn de shíhou, wǒ tōngcháng huì wèn fúwùyuán wúxiàn wǎngluò de mìmǎ, zhèyàng kěyǐ yòng diànnǎo xuéxí.
ex_zh: When I go to a café, I usually ask the waiter for the wifi password, so I can study on my computer.

quote_en: 这些数据很重要。 Zhèxiē shùjù hěn zhòngyào.
quote_zh: This data is very important.
ex_en: 老师用数据告诉我们，每天运动三十分钟对身体很有好处，同学们听了都觉得有道理。 Lǎoshī yòng shùjù gàosu wǒmen, měitiān yùndòng sānshí fēnzhōng duì shēntǐ hěn yǒu hǎochù, tóngxuémen tīng le dōu juéde yǒu dàolǐ.
ex_zh: The teacher used data to tell us that exercising thirty minutes every day is very good for health; all the students thought it made sense.

def_zh: 充电数据线；数据线坏了
quote_en: 我的数据线断了。 Wǒ de shùjùxiàn duàn le.
quote_zh: My USB cable is broken.
ex_en: 出门旅行时一定要记得带数据线和充电宝，不然手机没电了，连地图都看不了。 Chūmén lǚxíng shí yīdìng yào jìde dài shùjùxiàn hé chōngdiànbǎo, bùrán shǒujī méi diàn le, lián dìtú dōu kàn bù liǎo.
ex_zh: When traveling, you must remember to bring a USB cable and a power bank; otherwise if your phone dies, you can’t even look at the map.

quote_en: 她在网上直播唱歌。 Tā zài wǎngshàng zhíbō chànggē.
quote_zh: She is live streaming singing online.
ex_en: 很多人喜欢看直播买东西，因为主播会介绍商品，有时候比店里还便宜。 Hěnduō rén xǐhuān kàn zhíbō mǎi dōngxi, yīnwèi zhǔbō huì jièshào shāngpǐn, yǒu shíhou bǐ diàn lǐ hái piányi.
ex_zh: Many people like to watch live streams to buy things, because the host introduces the products, and sometimes they are cheaper than in stores.

quote_en: 请转发这条消息。 Qǐng zhuǎnfā zhè tiáo xiāoxi.
quote_zh: Please forward this message.
ex_en: 在网上看到有趣的文章，我会转发给好朋友，大家一起分享快乐。 Zài wǎngshàng kàndào yǒuqù de wénzhāng, wǒ huì zhuǎnfā gěi hǎo péngyou, dàjiā yīqǐ fēnxiǎng kuàilè.
ex_zh: When I see an interesting article online, I forward it to my good friends so we can share the joy together.

quote_en: 他给我点了赞。 Tā gěi wǒ diǎn le zàn.
quote_zh: He gave me a like.
ex_en: 很多人发照片到朋友圈就是为了得到点赞，但是我觉得真实的生活比点赞更重要。 Hěnduō rén fā zhàopiàn dào péngyouquān jiùshì wèile dédào diǎnzàn, dànshì wǒ juéde zhēnshí de shēnghuó bǐ diǎnzàn gèng zhòngyào.
ex_zh: Many people post photos on social media just to get likes, but I think real life is more important than likes.

def_zh: 机器人技术；机器人比赛
quote_en: 这个机器人会走路。 Zhège jīqìrén huì zǒulù.
quote_zh: This robot can walk.
ex_en: 现在的机器人可以帮忙扫地、送菜，将来可能还会帮我们做更多事情，让生活更轻松。 Xiànzài de jīqìrén kěyǐ bāngmáng sǎo dì, sòng cài, jiānglái kěnéng hái huì bāng wǒmen zuò gèng duō shìqing, ràng shēnghuó gèng qīngsōng.
ex_zh: Nowadays robots can help sweep the floor and deliver food; in the future they might help us do even more things, making life easier.

def_zh: 无人机拍摄；无人机飞行
quote_en: 无人机在天上飞。 Wú rén jī zài tiān shàng fēi.
quote_zh: The drone is flying in the sky.
ex_en: 很多人用无人机拍婚礼和风景，拍出来的照片特别漂亮，从天上看的景色完全不一样。 Hěnduō rén yòng wú rén jī pāi hūnlǐ hé fēngjǐng, pāi chūlái de zhàopiàn tèbié piàoliang, cóng tiān shàng kàn de jǐngsè wánquán bù yīyàng.
ex_zh: Many people use drones to film weddings and scenery; the photos are especially beautiful because the view from above is completely different.

def_zh: 无人驾驶汽车；无人驾驶技术
quote_en: 无人驾驶汽车很先进。 Wú rén jiàshǐ qìchē hěn xiānjìn.
quote_zh: Self-driving cars are very advanced.
ex_en: 虽然无人驾驶汽车很方便，但是很多人还是不敢坐，觉得让机器开车不安全。 Suīrán wú rén jiàshǐ qìchē hěn fāngbiàn, dànshì hěnduō rén háishì bù gǎn zuò, juéde ràng jīqì kāichē bù ānquán.
ex_zh: Although self-driving cars are very convenient, many people still dare not ride in them, thinking it’s unsafe to let a machine drive.

def_zh: 人工智能技术；发展人工智能
quote_en: 人工智能越来越厉害了。 Rén gōng zhì néng yuè lái yuè lìhai le.
quote_zh: Artificial intelligence is getting more and more powerful.
ex_en: 人工智能可以帮助医生看病、帮助老师改作业，但是我觉得它永远不能代替人和人之间的感情。 Rén gōng zhì néng kěyǐ bāngzhù yīshēng kàn bìng, bāngzhù lǎoshī gǎi zuòyè, dànshì wǒ juéde tā yǒngyuǎn bùnéng dàitì rén hé rén zhī jiān de gǎnqíng.
ex_zh: AI can help doctors diagnose illnesses and help teachers grade homework, but I think it can never replace the feelings between people.
